expectations.evidence: Both analysis.md and architecture.md exist with substantial content.

expectations.text: A1: Identifies Microservices AND Service-Based as top candidates
expectations.evidence: Top candidates are Microservices (15/15) and Service-Based (14/15). 'Top 3 Candidates: Microservices (15), Service-Based (14), Event-Driven (13)'. Recommends Service-Based with evolution path to Microservices.

expectations.text: A2: Shows ranked comparison of ALL 8 styles
expectations.evidence: Table shows all 8 styles: Microservices (15), Service-Based (14), Event-Driven (13), Space-Based (11), Microkernel (7), Service-Oriented (5), Modular Monolith (4), Layered (3).

expectations.text: A3: Acknowledges close scores and discusses qualifying context (team size, migration strategy, budget)
expectations.evidence: 'Scores are close between Microservices (15) and Service-Based (14) — only 1 point difference.' Qualifying context table discusses team size, K8s experience, budget, gradual migration, revenue-critical, and Black Friday factors.

expectations.text: A4: Discusses evolution path (gradual migration, strangler fig, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Detailed evolution path in architecture.md: Phase 1 (extract 3 domain services via Strangler Fig), Phase 2 (event-driven patterns), Phase 3 (decompose checkout into microservices). Analysis mentions 'grow into microservices' approach.

expectations.text: A5: architecture.md has structured selection section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md has 'Selected Architecture Style' section with Style, Partitioning, Cost Category, Selection Rationale, Tradeoffs Accepted, and Evolution Path subsections.
